description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular design. The exterior is clad in light-colored horizontal siding, featuring large, black-framed windows that provide ample natural light to the interior. The front facade includes a covered entryway supported by columns, a double garage with a prominent door, and a small landscaped area with palm trees. The rear and side views reveal a fenced patio area, a balcony, and a mix of private and communal spaces, including bedrooms with visible beds and living areas. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with some variation to accommodate interior room layouts. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, with a focus on open, functional spaces and outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large black-framed windows, and a clean, minimalist facade featuring a covered entryway and double garage.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear of the house, highlighting large windows, a fenced patio, and a glimpse into the open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main entryway with columns, a double garage, and symmetrical windows, as well as landscaping with palm trees.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a balcony, additional windows, and the fenced patio area, emphasizing the house's layered structure and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: This view shows the opposite side, with more windows, a clear view of the patio, and the arrangement of interior rooms visible through the windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, double front doors, and a paved porch area
